what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-d5691851
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset
conventions: target referenced via board:// URI scheme
concerns: No payload or explanatory body is present
The referenced board item is not described here
No author or provenance field is recorded
notes: A bare attachment pointer that records when a dragnet-development channel attachment was linked to a specific board item.
questions: What content or object does board://item-d5691851 represent?
Why was this attachment created and by whom?
Is the target board item still current or valid?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — the file is purely a metadata record with no explicit purpose statement beyond its fields, and it behaves as an attachment pointer.
intention_signals: To capture and persist a dated relationship between a channel attachment and a board item so it can be retrieved as part of channel memory.
novelty: The target field uses a board:// URI scheme, and the file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no additional content.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped mapping from a channel attachment to a board item, supporting retrieval and contextual linkage in a fused channel-memory system.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file (att-659bf856) in the dragnet-development channel, of type board_items, pointing to board item item-d5691851 and recording an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a dated reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item for later retrieval or context.
